included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrive in Munnar & Spice & Tea Tour
itinerary.description: Arrive in Munnar. Walk through the misty, rolling tea plantations, visit Mattupetty Dam, and explore Eravikulam National Park.

itinerary.title: Wonderla Theme Park Adventure & Departure
itinerary.description: Travel to Kochi. Spend a full, high-action day experiencing the incredible amusement rides, water slides, and wave pools at Wonderla before departing.

title: Munnar & Wonderla: Hills & Amusement Thrills
description: Enjoy a perfect balance of highland tranquility and high-energy excitement. Stroll through the misty, endless tea plantations of Munnar, spot rare Nilgiri Tahr in Eravikulam, and spend a full day of thrilling rides and water slides at Wonderla Amusement Park near Kochi.
highlights: Trek through the rolling, green tea estates of Munnar
Spot rare wildlife in Eravikulam National Park
Spend a full day of adventure at Wonderla Amusement Park
